dialogueLines.Speaker: Echo
dialogueLines.text: Hello weird fairy...thing. Could you tell me why everything looks like I'm seeing it through a purple fishbowl?

dialogueLines.Speaker: Echo
dialogueLines.text: Yeah, I'm awake now. Mind telling me who the f*#% you are?!

dialogueLines.Speaker: Echo
dialogueLines.text: You know, being around a forest my whole life, I should've known better than to eat those berries.

dialogueLines.Speaker: Echo
dialogueLines.text: Where am I? Who are you? Get away from me.

dialogueLines.Speaker: Chime
dialogueLines.text: Hey! There's no need to be rude, we're more familiar than you think.

dialogueLines.Speaker: Chime
dialogueLines.text: This isn't a wild berry hallucination, silly!

dialogueLines.Speaker: Chime
dialogueLines.text: Relax! I promise, I'm not here to hurt you.

dialogueLines.Speaker: Chime
dialogueLines.text: I'm sure you have many questions, I'll do my best to explain. My name is Chime, your guiding fairy, and we're in the astral plane now. This is the astral form of your house.

choices.text: That doesn't make things any clearer.
Can I go back to sleep?

dialogueLines.Speaker: Chime
dialogueLines.text: The astral plane is set in the past, but it's your present. You're special, Echo. Your involvement with everyone here saw to your awakening of powers. I'm here to guide you, so you can use those powers to better everyone's outcomes.

dialogueLines.Speaker: Chime
dialogueLines.text: Earlier today, your friends spoke of the people they lost, and how they wish they could have changed the past. Here, you can do just that, as a mediator of sorts.

dialogueLines.Speaker: Chime
dialogueLines.text: Can you help your friends move forward, without regret?

choices.text: I'm not sure, but I'll try.

dialogueLines.Speaker: Chime
dialogueLines.text: That's the spirit! Let's get going.

dialogueLines.Speaker: Chime
dialogueLines.text: Helping the others will fix your biggest problem. Just trust me.

dialogueLines.Speaker: Chime
dialogueLines.text: We'll have to go through a gate in The Graveyard. Grab what you need, and when you're ready, we'll head out.
